description: Style NoteSpring Summer 2012 saw statement accessories steal the show on ramps. Now bring this trend to your wardrobe with this stylish french connection wallet, crafted from superior materials. Pair these with unlikely pieces in your wardrobe be it pastel hues or colour pops.Product DetailsDull blue purse with cheetah printHas a twist clasp and a fabric innerMaterial and CarePolyurethaneWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSize Height: 13 cmWidth: 16 cmDepth: 2 cm
